THEPENITENT-BURDEN_POWER.description: At the end of combat, lose HP equal to your Burden. If this would kill you, survive at 1 HP and lose Max HP equal to the excess.
THEPENITENT-BURDEN_POWER.smartDescriptio: At the end of combat, lose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP. If this would kill you, survive at 1 HP and lose Max HP equal to the excess.
THEPENITENT-BURDEN_POWER.title: Burden
THEPENITENT-ASHEN_EDICT_POWER.smartDescr: Whenever you Ascend, apply [blue]1[/blue] Weak to a random enemy.
THEPENITENT-ASHEN_EDICT_POWER.title: Ashen Edict
THEPENITENT-ASHEN_EDICT_ALL_ENEMIES_POWE: Whenever you Ascend, apply Weak to ALL enemies.
Whenever you Ascend, apply [blue]1[/blue] Weak to ALL enemies.
THEPENITENT-CROWN_OF_THORNS_POWER.descri: The first time each combat your Descend creates Burden, gain that much Block.
THEPENITENT-CROWN_OF_THORNS_POWER.smartD: The first time each combat your Descend creates Burden, gain that much Block.
THEPENITENT-CROWN_OF_THORNS_POWER.title: Crown of Thorns
THEPENITENT-CROWN_OF_THORNS_VENGEFUL_POW: The first time each combat your Descend creates Burden, gain that much Block and deal that much damage to a random enemy.
The first time each combat your Descend creates Burden, gain that much Block and deal that much damage to a random enemy.
THEPENITENT-FAITH_POWER.description: Faith prevents damage equal to its amount. This persists between turns.
THEPENITENT-FAITH_POWER.title: Faith
THEPENITENT-GRIM_CERTAINTY_POWER.descrip: Whenever your Descend creates Burden, deal damage to a random enemy.
THEPENITENT-GRIM_CERTAINTY_POWER.smartDe: Whenever your Descend creates Burden, deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to a random enemy.
THEPENITENT-GRIM_CERTAINTY_POWER.title: Grim Certainty
THEPENITENT-RITES_OF_ENDURANCE_POWER.des: Whenever Faith prevents damage, gain Block next turn.
THEPENITENT-RITES_OF_ENDURANCE_POWER.sma: Whenever Faith prevents damage, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] Block next turn.
THEPENITENT-ZEALOUS_RETORT_POWER.descrip: Whenever Faith prevents damage, deal damage to the attacker
THEPENITENT-ZEALOUS_RETORT_POWER.smartDe: Whenever Faith prevents damage, deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to the attacker
THEPENITENT-ZEALOUS_RETORT_POWER.title: Zealous Retort
